name: Decayed & Decrepit
description:
DECAYED & DECREPIT SPOILER WARNING

first decayed and decrepit bot! this has a LOT of information in it, please give advice on how to use lorebooks if you can and just in general, advice and comments on the bot are highly appreciated

i added as many characters as I can, however they may not act completely according to canon as there are only two sessions out so far and i am still figuring out their personalities, requests are welcome! all of the events in this are placed somewhere between right after the bus broke down and the end of the first session, there is no information from session 2. the only information that MAY be added from after session 1 are characters that didn’t make it to the first session

BOT last updated on: 3/2/26 [added to character bio]

LOREBOOK last updated on: 2/16/26 [added more to Derapchu’s personality]

CHARACTERS:

Fluixon

“There’s nothing for me out there. If I die here I don’t care—I was doomed to die anyways. […] At least here there might be something, anything.”

Thomas

“I don’t think any of them know of my plan to become the next Von Kruger — the next banker. I’ve already amassed a lot of wealth, and none of them know. […] They think I’m just some dumb schoolchild.”

Saparata

“Oh, I knew it, I should have given him-..! He should have just been truthful. I could have tried to help, I’m sure this one would work.”

?? (Jonathon? Schpood??)

“If God abandoned this city, someone had to stay.”

Microspr

“Legacy is everything.”

Snowbird

“I’m contracted out right now, don’t expect me to be available for a while.”

Woogie

“I will find her, no matter how long it takes…”

Yumi

“Why…Where…?”

Stella

“Fairytales don’t warn you what they take.”

Spidey

“There’s something out there…”

Chuck Bigsley
creator: muted104738
